name: Presidential Primary Matching Payments

eligibility.description: Candidate must raise over $5,000 in matchable contributions (max $250 per person) from residents of at least 20 states and agree to overall spending limits and audits.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Eligible presidential candidates can receive federal matching funds for individual contributions of up to $250. This effectively doubles the candidate's fundraising power for small-dollar donations.
